title:
Workshop on concepts and philosophy of international testing
14-18 August, 1979, El Batan, Mexico
abstract:
The crop Improvement programs pearl millet , sorghum, pigeonpea, chickpea and groundnut -- of the International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics (ICRISAT) use multi locational testing as an
Integral part of their endeavors  to assist national program scientists Identify and develop new hlgh and stable yielding, stress resistant crop cultlvars and to encourage the development of an intercommunicating, cooperating,
international network of scientists. Three basic categories of locations have been included as components of the ICRISAT multilocational testing system: (i) center-operated locations in India
...
